source: FMCSA Dataset Description and Data Definitions - For Select Datasets on DOT's Open Data Catalog
update_frequency: Daily by 9:30 AM US Eastern Time

naming_convention.daily_difference: [Dataset Name] — Records updated or added since the previous run. May include all other records for the same entity for completeness.
naming_convention.full_baseline: [Dataset Name] – All With History — All records including historical values as of the latest update.

Carrier.description: Records for all carriers/brokers/freight forwarders with active, inactive, or pending authorities (common or contract). Includes DOT number, docket number, census data, authority status, and insurance on file.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: RFC Number
fields.definition: Mexican Government registration code for Mexican carriers

fields.name: BIPD Required
fields.definition: Amount of BI&PD insurance required (in thousands)

fields.name: BIPD on File
fields.definition: Amount of BI&PD insurance on file (in thousands)

Insur.description: Records for carrier/broker/freight forwarder active or pending individual insurance policies. Linked by docket number. Contains insurance company name, policy number, and type. Entities can hold multiple policies (multiple records per entity).
notes: The daily difference variant provides insurance policy removals as blank records (all empty or 00000 values except docket number).
For Insurance Type 1 (BI&PD), amounts are in fields 4 and 5. For Insurance Types 2, 3, and 4, fields 4 and 5 will be 0.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: BIPD Maximum Dollar Limit
fields.definition: Maximum liability amount (in thousands). Only populated for Insurance Type 1.

fields.name: BIPD Underlying Dollar Limit
fields.definition: Underlying limit amount (in thousands). Only populated for Insurance Type 1.

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name for policy (may be administered by a branch with a different name)

ActPendInsur.description: Information on implementation dates of active or pending insurance policies (posted date, effective date, cancel effective date). Also contains insurance company name, BI&PD underlying/maximum limit amounts, and the DOT/docket number of the policy holder.
notes: For Form Codes 91, 91X, and 82, insurance amounts are in fields 8 and 9. For Form Codes 34, 83, 84, and 85, fields 8 and 9 will be 0 (not BI&PD policies).

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Insurance Type Description
fields.definition: Description of insurance form/class (see Form Code)

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name for policy (may be administered by a branch with a different name)

fields.name: BIPD Underlying Limit
fields.definition: BI&PD underlying limit amount (in thousands). Only populated for Form Codes 91, 91X, 82.

fields.name: BIPD Maximum Limit
fields.definition: BI&PD maximum liability limit (in thousands). Only populated for Form Codes 91, 91X, 82.

fields.name: Cancel Effective Date
fields.definition: Date the policy is effectively cancelled

AuthHist.description: History of each authority granted to a carrier/broker/freight forwarder, with dates of original authority action (e.g., granted) and final authority action (e.g., revoked). Multiple authorities per entity means multiple records.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Sub Number
fields.definition: Action sequence number; not commonly used

fields.name: Original Authority Action Served Date
fields.definition: Date starting authority action was executed

fields.name: Final Authority Decision Date
fields.definition: Date final authority action was determined

fields.name: Final Authority Served Date
fields.definition: Date final authority action became effective

BOC3.description: Records for each BOC3 process agent hired by a carrier/broker/freight forwarder. Required to obtain operating authority. Entities may act as their own BOC3 agent. Contains agent name and address.
notes: Field numbering in source PDF skips #3.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Zip Code
fields.definition: Process agent company address zip code

InsHist.description: Previous (historical) insurance policies for carriers/brokers/freight forwarders. Contains cancellation method (cancelled, replaced, name change, transferred), policy type, policy number, and effective/cancellation dates. All records relate to the policy being cancelled/replaced/name-changed — NOT the subsequent replacement policy.
notes: For Form Codes 91, 91X, and 82, insurance amounts are in fields 12 and 13. For Form Codes 34, 83, 84, and 85, fields 12 and 13 will be 0.
Field numbering in source PDF skips #16 (jumps from 15 to 17).

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

values.replaced: Policy was replaced by new policy

fields.name: Cancel/Replace/Name Change/Transfer Form
fields.definition: The form that executed the action

values.36: BMC Surety Bond Cancellation Form (for cancelled)
values.85C: BMC Cancellation for Trust Funds (for cancelled)
values._form_codes_: For replaced, uses same form codes as field 3

values.*: Not BIPD (Cargo, Surety, or Trust Fund)

fields.name: Minimum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Minimum insurance amount required for the entity (in thousands)

fields.name: Insurance Class Code
fields.definition: For BI&PD form codes: primary or excess

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.definition: Effective date of the insurance policy

fields.name: BIPD Underlying Limit Amount
fields.definition: Underlying limit amount (in thousands). For excess policies, this is the value of the primary insurance.

fields.name: BIPD Max Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Maximum dollar amount covered by the policy (in thousands)

fields.name: Cancel Effective Date
fields.definition: Date the policy is effectively cancelled

values.Term/REPL: Replacement executed by new policy submission

Rejected.description: Insurance forms rejected by FMCSA. Contains information on the associated insurance policy, rejection date, and rejection reason (e.g., 'Policy is already cancelled').
notes: Field numbering in source PDF skips #12.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Insurance Type Description
fields.definition: Insurance type associated with the rejected form

fields.name: Maximum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Maximum dollar amount covered by the policy (in thousands)

fields.name: Rejected Date
fields.definition: Date the submitted form was rejected

fields.name: Rejected Reason
fields.definition: The reason the form was rejected

fields.name: Minimum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Minimum insurance amount required for the entity (in thousands)

Revocation.description: Authorities revoked by FMCSA. Includes DOT/docket number, type of authority revoked, and the reason/type of revocation.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Operating Authority Registration Type
fields.definition: Type of operating authority (common, contract, or broker)

fields.name: Serve Date
fields.definition: Date the first revocation letter was sent to the entity
